header: Combos Used In Atraxa, Praetors' Voice (3171 Combos)

articles.excerpt: Infect was a dominating force in Legacy for a time, but is that raw power able to make an impact in Commander? Let's see!

articles.value: Cocktail Hour for the Top 10 Commanders, With mtgdemonictutor
articles.excerpt: Like to have cocktails while you play Commander? Then check out these cocktails created for the top 10 commanders on EDHREC.

articles.value: Adding Compleatly New Cards for Atraxa Decks
articles.excerpt: Got an old Atraxa deck gathering dust? Spruce her up with some of these great new cards that have come out in the last two years.
This list of the top 40 four-mana commanders is full of many of the best commanders out there. How many of these have you played against?
If you like doing something weird with really popular commanders, then March's Archidekt Deckbuilding Contest is right up your alley.
